CustomField.description: If selected, a keyword search using the Company input field will not search the parsed Employer Organization 1, Employer Organization 2, and Employer Organization 3 fields on the Contact record. The Company Name on the Employment History object will be searched.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: If selected, a keyword search using the Company input field will not search the parsed Employer Organization 1, 2, and 3 fields on the Contact record. The Company Name on the Employment History object will be searched.
CustomField.label: Disable Parsed Company fields
